info.title: BreezeDoc API
info.description:
# Introduction
BreezeDoc's REST API provides a handful of endpoints which can be used to get information about your account and bookings.  It uses conventional OAuth 2.0 protocol for authentication.

# Authentication
### Personal Access Token
Create a personal access token at https://breezedoc.com/integrations/api.  Once created, it can be used to authenticate requests by passing it in the `Authorization` header.
```
Authorization: Bearer {TOKEN}
```

### OAuth 2.0 Client
If you're building a custom integration to BreezeDoc which requires users to authenticate in order to get access tokens to make API requests on their behalf, you'll need to create an OAuth 2.0 client. This is easy to do from the \"OAuth Apps\" settings page found here https://breezedoc.com/integrations/api

Using the `authorization_code` grant type to authenticate users using OAuth 2.0 to retrieve an access token is fairly conventional, more information on that process can be found here: https://www.oauth.com/oauth2-servers/server-side-apps/authorization-code/


* Authorization URL: https://breezedoc.com/oauth/authorize
* Access Token URL: https://breezedoc.com/oauth/token

# Rate Limiting
The API currently has a rate limit of 60 requests per minute. If you exceed this limit, you will receive a 429 error.

title.description: Invoice title displayed to the customer

pay_url.description: URL where the customer can pay the invoice

localized_unit_price.description: Formatted unit price with currency symbol

id.description: Payment platform UUID. Online payment buttons currently use Stripe or PayPal IDs.

post.summary: Send a document to its recipients

recipients.description: Array of recipients that must match the number of recipients on the document, provided in ascending order of party.

400.description: Bad request - Document may have already been sent

403.description: Forbidden - User may not have permission to send this document

get.summary: Get recipients for a specific document

200.description: List of document recipients retrieved successfully

post.summary: Create a new document from a template

get.summary: Get list of documents sent by any member of a team
get.description:
Retrieves a list of all documents sent by any member of a given team. This exposes an existing data relationship.
Use Case: Enables a team lead or agency owner to build a custom dashboard to monitor their team's signing activities and document statuses.

200.description: List of team documents retrieved successfully

403.description: Forbidden - User does not have permission to view this team's documents

get.summary: Get list of templates shared with a specific team
get.description:
Retrieves a list of all templates shared with a specific team.
Use Case: Allows an organization to programmatically audit their team's available templates to ensure brand and legal compliance.

200.description: List of team templates retrieved successfully

403.description: Forbidden - User does not have permission to view this team's templates

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of invoices for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new invoice with line items. Optionally sends the invoice immediately by setting `send: true`.

title.description: Optional invoice title. Omitted or null values use the default title, "Invoice".

payment_terms.description: Optional payment due term label. Clients should still provide the calculated payment_due date.

payment_platform_ids.description: Array of payment platform UUIDs to enable for this invoice. Online payment buttons currently use Stripe (`0ce25e9d-949b-4a89-8aef-36bdc07b1ec5`) or PayPal (`61059a6c-f124-4948-8616-0ae581fad7ea`).

send.description: If true, immediately sends the invoice to the customer

items.details: Product meeting, Review management, Sprint planning

put.description:
Updates an existing invoice. Cannot update invoices with status: paid, uncollectible, or void.
When updating items, the entire items array is replaced.

invoice_number.description: Optional invoice reference number. Send null to clear it.

payment_terms.description: Optional payment due term label. Send null to clear it.

payment_platform_ids.description: Array of payment platform UUIDs to enable for this invoice. Online payment buttons currently use Stripe (`0ce25e9d-949b-4a89-8aef-36bdc07b1ec5`) or PayPal (`61059a6c-f124-4948-8616-0ae581fad7ea`).

422.description: Validation error or invoice cannot be updated due to its status

patch.description: Same as PUT - updates an existing invoice. Cannot update invoices with status paid, uncollectible, or void.

invoice_number.description: Optional invoice reference number. Send null to clear it.

payment_terms.description: Optional payment due term label. Send null to clear it.

payment_platform_ids.description: Array of payment platform UUIDs to enable for this invoice. Online payment buttons currently use Stripe (`0ce25e9d-949b-4a89-8aef-36bdc07b1ec5`) or PayPal (`61059a6c-f124-4948-8616-0ae581fad7ea`).

422.description: Validation error or invoice cannot be updated due to its status

delete.description: Deletes a draft invoice. Cannot delete invoices that have already been sent.

422.description: Cannot delete an invoice that has already been sent

post.summary: Send an invoice to the customer
post.description: Sends (or re-sends) an invoice to the customer via email. Cannot send invoices with status: paid, uncollectible, or void.

422.description: Cannot send an invoice with its current status
